About Me

S. Xu (许士亭)

Lecturer, Department of Cyberspace Security, Shandong University of Political Science and Law

"NLP as well as Deep Learning could not only help machines better understand human beings, but also help us to know ourselves better."

I research in NLP and data mining related areas. My research interests include Machine Learning, NLP, Deep Learning and Data Mining. I am very interested in erecting novel models and admiring effects they bring to the world. I have also worked on Information Security related to malicious software classification.

I have been performing magic for nearly ten years. My favourite class of magic is card magic because it can be shown in almost any conditions. I had been president of magic club in my undergraduate college for 2 years and performed stage magic many times. My favourite card magician is Shin Lim since his magic effects are so visual that like real magic.
